backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Raj Empire Esports backend, defining data types and state for users, tournaments, registrations, support tickets, OTPs, and social links, with access-controlled query/update methods for managing all these entities.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the multi-step registration flow (Step 1: user info collection, Step 2: Internet Identity login) is implemented in RegisterPage.tsx with high confidence.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON-formatted text file containing short summaries of each frontend source file, describing the purpose and key details of every page, component, hook, and config file in the project.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file that imports Tailwind directives and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens including background, foreground, primary, border, chart, and sidebar variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Vite/React app, loading Google Fonts (Rajdhani, Orbitron, Saira Condensed) and mounting the React app via the root div and main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application file that configures TanStack Router with all routes (home, register, login, tournaments, dashboard, terms, admin login, admin dashboard), wraps everything in QueryClientProvider, AuthProvider, and AdminAuthProvider.
frontend/src/components/AdminProtectedRo: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated admin users to /admin by checking isAdminAuthenticated from AdminAuthContext.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer component that displays the brand logo, quick navigation links (using useNavigate), and social media icons (YouTube, Instagram, Telegram) fetched via useGetSocialLinks.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky navigation header with logo, desktop/mobile nav links, and conditional auth controls (login/register or player dashboard/logout) based on authentication state.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Root layout component that wraps all pages with a Header, Footer, and a flex-column container, rendering child routes via Outlet.
frontend/src/components/PaymentModal.tsx: Modal dialog for joining a tournament by spending coins; checks wallet balance, calls the register mutation, and shows success or error feedback.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the login page and renders children only when authenticated.
frontend/src/context/AdminAuthContext.ts: React context providing admin authentication state persisted in localStorage, with login/logout helpers and a legacy login alias for backward compatibility.
frontend/src/context/AuthContext.tsx: React context managing player session state (mobile, displayName, bgmiPlayerId) persisted in localStorage, exposing login and logout functions.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and provider for Internet Identity authentication via DFINITY AuthClient, exposing identity, login/clear functions, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralized collection of React Query hooks (queries and mutations) for all backend operations including tournaments, registrations, players, wallet, support tickets, and admin actions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Orbitron/Rajdhani/Exo 2 fonts, defining light/dark CSS custom properties, Tailwind layers, scrollbar styles, and brand gradient utilities.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that wraps the App component with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider before mounting to the DOM.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page with a collapsible sidebar and tabbed sections for managing tournaments, registrations, players, payment proofs, withdrawals, support tickets, social links, and terms via custom query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Two-phase admin login page with hardcoded credentials for each phase; on success it calls adminLogin() and redirects to the admin dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Player dashboard page with a responsive sidebar and tabs for profile, tournaments, wallet, withdrawals, and support, pulling data via custom React Query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Public landing page featuring a hero section with CTA buttons and a features grid highlighting daily tournaments, mega events, game modes, and security.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Player login page that triggers Internet Identity authentication, fetches the caller's profile from the backend actor, and redirects to the player dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/RegisterPage.tsx: Multi-step registration page that collects display name, mobile, and BGMI Player ID in step 1, then triggers Internet Identity authentication in step 2, and finalizes player registration on the ICP backend in step 3.
frontend/src/pages/TermsPage.tsx: Displays the platform's Terms & Conditions fetched from the backend, falling back to hardcoded content, with numbered sections parsed and rendered in a styled card layout.
frontend/src/pages/TournamentsPage.tsx: Lists all BGMI tournaments with search and status filter controls, and opens a PaymentModal for registration when an authenticated user clicks to join a tournament.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module providing helper functions to read URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persist them to sessionStorage, and clean sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom brand colors (red, orange, dark), Orbitron/Rajdhani/Exo 2 fonts, brand gradient and shadow utilities, and accordion animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the BGMI tournament platform's current features, known issues (registration flow bug), and pending feature requests at schema version 1.0.0.
